title: Black Pepper Beef Tenderloin Spaghetti

steps.text: Cut the beef tenderloin into thin strips. Marinate with the light soy sauce, oyster sauce, sugar, white pepper, cornstarch and oil, and leave for 15 minutes.
steps.text_su: Iris daging sapi dadi dawa-dawa. Lumuri nganggo kecap asin, saus tiram, gulo, mrico putih, maizena ambek lengo, terus enepno 15 menit.

steps.text: Cook the spaghetti in salted water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
steps.text_su: Rebus spageti nang banyu sing wis diuyahi ngasi al dente, terus tirisno.

steps.text: Heat oil in a pan over high heat and sear the marinated beef until just browned. Remove and set aside.
steps.text_su: Panasno lengo nang kuali geni gedhe, terus goreng daging sing wis dibumboni ngasi rodok coklat. Angkat, sèlèhno disik.

steps.text: In the same pan, sauté the chopped garlic until fragrant, then add the onion and bell peppers and stir-fry until slightly softened.
steps.text_su: Nang kuali sing podo, tumis bawang putih ngasi wangi, terus lebokno bawang bombay ambek paprika, oseng ngasi rodok layu.

steps.text: Add the drained spaghetti. Season with oyster sauce, sweet soy sauce, dark soy sauce and black pepper, adjusting to taste, and toss to coat evenly.
steps.text_su: Lebokno spageti sing wis ditirisno. Bumboni nganggo saus tiram, kecap manis, kecap ireng ambek lada hitam, atur miturut selera, terus aduk ngasi rata.

steps.text: Return the beef to the pan, toss everything together until hot and well combined, then plate and serve.
steps.text_su: Balikno daginge nang kuali, aduk kabeh ngasi panas lan nyampur rata, terus tata nang piring, sajekno.

notes: Captured from the Reel's on-screen text and cooking steps. The video lists the seasonings without exact amounts ("season to taste"), so the quantities here are sensible starting points — adjust the soy sauces, oyster sauce and black pepper to your preference. Marinate the beef for at least 15 minutes for tender results.
notes_su: Dijupuk teko tulisan ambek langkah nang video. Video mung nyebutno bumbune tanpa ukuran pas ("atur miturut selera"), dadi ukuran nang kene mung ancer-ancer — atur kecap, saus tiram ambek lada hitam sak senengmu. Enepno daginge paling sithik 15 menit ben empuk.
